claims.summary: Emotional and intentional dimensions can feel ungrounded when they run parallel to semantic projection rather than being anchored by it.
High-entropy vibrancy can hit bounded delivery ceilings, flattening intensity unless overflow is preserved as truth-channel evidence.
Reserved dimensions 44-47 may eventually need a Shadow-Density signal, but live reserved-dim writes would expand vector authority.
Adaptive `semantic_trickle` or `codec_gain` could reduce viscous heaviness when codec weight feels too high.
